subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of the Blessed Beauty! Truly ye have laid down your lives and become servants of the All-Merciful. 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق جمال مبارک حقا که جانفشانید و خادم حضرت رحمان عبدالبهاء از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
